Prompted: Tell me about the Prime Directive.

The Prime Directive (General Order 1) prohibits Starfleet personnel from interfering with the natural development of pre-warp civilizations.

Prime-Directive-summary.txt
Jun 4, 2026, 11:48:37 AM PDT
Gemini Apps

Prompted: How does a warp coil work?

A warp coil generates an asymmetric subspace field around the ship, allowing faster-than-light travel without local time dilation.

Jun 5, 2026, 10:15:00 AM PDT
